# LEC: Communicating data science results effectively


```{r goodtalk-setup, include = FALSE, echo = FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
source("common.R")

library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(DT)
```


You can follow along with the slides [here][d15_goodtalk] if you would like to open them full-screen.

```{r goodtalk-include-tweet-comm, echo=FALSE}
try_include_tweet("https://twitter.com/DaphnaHarel/status/1366792094279495685")
```

```{r goodtalk-include-video-goodtalk, echo=FALSE,eval = knitr::is_latex_output()}
embed_youtube_alt("xGP08paoAKI")
```
```{r goodtalk-include-video-goodtalk-html, echo=FALSE,eval = knitr::is_html_output()}
"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xGP08paoAKI" %>%
  embed_url() %>%
  use_align("center")
```

```{r goodtalk-include-slides-goodtalk, echo=FALSE}
slide_url(ds4p_urls, "d15_goodtalk") %>%
  include_url(height = "400px")
```


```{r courselinks, child="includes/courselinks.md"}
```
